title: Principal Frontend Developer at Aptech South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Aptech South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aptech South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Jaipur-based team.

About Aptech South Asia Partners:
Aptech South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech South Asia Partners!
